summary: Compilation of news broadcasts covering President Trump recognizing Jacqueline Medina (mother of slain cheerleader Lizbeth Medina) at the State of the Union: a Local 4 anchor (Ian Mason) at a news desk, NBC News SOTU coverage with a chyron 'Trump mentions murder of former Grand Island teen', and Trump speaking at the rostrum. The footage is a montage of TV-news clips with no music.
notable_text: LOCAL 4 ALERT CENTER; IAN MASON; ALERT CENTER; TRUMP MENTIONS MURDER OF FORMER GRAND ISLAND TEEN; NBC NEWS
